body:
Following breaking changes in [Oceananigans.jl](http://github.com/CliMA/Oceananigans.jl/releases/tag/v0.100.0), I have changed references to `ExponentialCoordinate` to `ExponentialDiscretization` + some other fixes.

[edited by @navidcy]

labels.description: Add this label to built the docs in a PR
labels.name: build docs

labels.description: Pull requests that update a dependency file
labels.name: dependencies

title: Changes `ExponentialCoordinate` to `ExponentialDiscretization`
